_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the per-domain source files; CI regenerates this file.

content.markdown:
# Notification

Notifications inform users of updates, background task completions, or events that require their attention. Individual notification items appear in the notification panel.

***

## When to use

* To inform users of completed background tasks.

* To surface updates or system events that require the user's attention.

* Do not use for actions requiring immediate input. Use a [modal](modal) instead.

## Style

* Use direct, concise language. One to two sentences.

* Include a timestamp.

* Include a link or action if the user must respond.

## Do / Don't

| Do                                                            | Don't                        |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| Export complete - Your file is ready to download.             | You have a new notification. |
| Connection error - The Snowflake connection failed. Reconnect | Something happened.          |

content.prose: Notifications inform users of updates, background task completions, or events that require their attention. Individual notification items appear in the notification panel.

bullets: To inform users of completed background tasks.
To surface updates or system events that require the user's attention.
Do not use for actions requiring immediate input. Use a [modal](modal) instead.
Use direct, concise language. One to two sentences.
Include a link or action if the user must respond.

content.do: Export complete - Your file is ready to download.
Connection error - The Snowflake connection failed. Reconnect

content.prose: Banners, toasts, inline messages, and modals form one messaging family. Each has a different scope, urgency, and lifespan. Choosing the right one keeps feedback proportional to what happened.

bullets: Validate late, clear early. Errors appear after the user leaves the field, not on the first keystroke, and disappear as soon as the value is valid. See [validation messages](validation-messages).
An unresolved change is not an error. A reminder that something is unsaved is a neutral, informational state, not an error state.
If the user must decide, use a modal, not a message. Reserve modals for blocking or destructive actions. Use a banner, toast, or inline message for anything else.

rows: Until the underlying issue is resolved
Top of the page, below the header
Cleared when the issue resolves, or dismissed if informational
"Some datasets are read-only. Contact your administrator to request edit access."
"This output port is managed by an external data contract and is read-only."
Dismisses automatically after a few seconds
On blur, or on submit attempt
Clears as soon as the field is valid
When the user must confirm or provide input before continuing
Dismissed only by completing or canceling the action
"This will permanently delete the dataset and cannot be undone."

content.prose: Do not use a banner for a short confirmation. Use a toast instead. Do not use a toast for something that requires a decision or blocks the user. Use a modal instead.
